ingredients_text: Savoury Noodles (48%) (Maize Flour, Yellow Peaour, Potato Starch, Gram Flour, Rapeseed Oil Salt, miri Chilli Powder (Chilli Powder, Rice Flour, Paprika Powder, Paprika Extract)), Chickpeas (15%) (Chickpeas, Rapeseed Oil), Peanuts (12%) (Peanuts, Rapeseed Oil), Chana Dal (12%) (Chana Dal, Rapeseed Oil), Green Lentils (12%) (Green Lentils, Rapeseed Oil), Bombay Seasoning (2%)(Rice Flour, Sugar, Salt, Spices (Paprika, Coriander Seed, Cumin, Fenugreek Seed, Turmeric, Cayenne Pepper, Chilli Blend Chilli, Cumin, Salt, Garlic, Oregano), Onion Powder, Acia. Citric Ac; Acidity Regulator: Sodium Diacetate; Garlic Powder, Tomato Powder, Turmeric Extract, Colour; Curcumin; Paprika Extract, Natural Flavouring, Antioxidant: Rosemary Extract)
